response.overview: After discovering that he has a tumor, Alif Zul goes to Doha. His departure is kept secret from his parents and his fiancée, Fasha. While staying in Doha, Alif Zul's illness returns. He meets Mr. Hanafi and his daughter Rhubi Athirah, who have been residing in Doha for more than 15 years. After Alif Zul's departure, Amri, his roommate, frequently meets with Fasha. Their relationship grows closer. They begin to harbor feelings for each other in silence. After some time, Alif Zul's health becomes increasingly concerning and he is forced to be sent home to Malaysia. Alif Zul's return causes Fasha and Amri to feel awkward. Will Fasha and Amri confess their true feelings to Alif Zul? Can Alif Zul accept the fate that has been determined for him?
response.title: Ayer Mata Doha
